Loading @composition/tests/assets/BasicNestedVariantsWithSameName_root/usda/root.usd@

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Layer Stack:
     root.usd

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </foo>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /foo
    root.usd             /foo{commonName=c}

Variant Selections:
    {commonName = c}

Child names:
     ['bar']

------------------------------------------------------------------------
Results for composing </foo/bar>

Prim Stack:
    root.usd             /foo/bar
    root.usd             /foo/bar{commonName=c}
    root.usd             /foo{commonName=c}bar

Variant Selections:
    {commonName = c}

Property names:
     ['value']

Property stacks:
/foo/bar.value:
    root.usd             /foo/bar.value
    root.usd             /foo/bar{commonName=c}.value
